title: Bazel Registry Metadata
description: Registry-wide metadata document served at /bazel_registry.json. Defined by https://bazel.build/external/registry.

mirrors.description: Optional ordered list of mirror URL prefixes Bazel will try before falling back to the archive's original URL.

module_base_path.description: Base directory used to resolve local_path source descriptors. Required when any source.json uses type: local_path.
